title: Faucibarba umbrosa

The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Faucibarba umbrosa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Faucibarba umbrosa is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used to treat respiratory infections, wounds, and skin irritations.
